No matter your political party, we must stand together for our democracy & fight back against this attempt to undermine it. No Kings. https://t.co/xm8vrcIkSZ

Tonight, according to reports, Trump will again try to sow doubt about the 2020 elections with the hopes of rigging the 2026 midterms.
 
Trouble is, Trump's own Intelligence Community, during his first term, found ZERO evidence for his claims.
 
Don’t fall for his con. https://t.co/SEoc43i8ir

Trump campaigned against forever wars. But by returning to full-scale war in Iran, he's dragging us into another endless conflict, breaking his promise yet again.

Trump's war has been a disaster for the American people, he must end it now.

The Beltsville Agricultural Research Center in MD develops the food safety practices that prevent food-borne illnesses like Cyclospora.

Yet, this admin is trying to close BARC with a half-baked plan that threatens critical research, wastes taxpayer money, & risks more outbreaks. https://t.co/v9EIMTASEo

Just last week, the Trump admin halted the project to put Harriet Tubman on the $20 bill. Now, they're all too happy to stroke Trump's ego & put his face on a coin.
 
Our currency should honor the best of America, not those who've done everything to destroy its founding promise.

ICE shot & killed 2 more people within a week, bringing the total to 10 since Trump's return.
 
We know from the cases of Renee Good & Alex Pretti, that DHS will lie to avoid accountability. 
 
We must get the truth and end this killing spree. https://t.co/9sVSXuqk4Y

For 250 years, Americans have answered that call & at this pivotal moment, I know we will again. https://t.co/x9XwXSCI0d
